note: Dory measured via a real dory-hv guest (kernel 6.12.30-dory) mounting a virtio-fs --share of a macOS dir and running fio/dd/git on it. OrbStack measured via a container bind mount of the same macOS dir. Docker Desktop not installed on this host.
